aximar.title: Solving Equations
aximar.description: Algebraic equations, systems, numerical roots, and ODEs.

cells.source:
/* System of equations */
solve([x + y = 10, x - y = 4], [x, y])

/* Nonlinear system */
algsys([x^2 + y^2 = 25, x*y = 12], [x, y])

/* Numerical root finding */
find_root(cos(x) - x, x, 0, 2)

/* First-order ODE */
ode2('diff(y,x) + 2*y = exp(-x), y, x)
